narrative:
Brooklyn City has 7,308 registered voters, with 59.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 10.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 19.0 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +7.8% D−R vs +23.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
